series_metadata.series_title: Contractually Reqd Submissions Related to Cultural/Sports/State Historical Facility Improvements
series_metadata.series_description: All materials submitted in response to obligations in the legal agreements related to the completion of approved capital improvements, including fundraising documentation related to the capital project.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until the project is approved, project work is complete, and the disbursement of approved funds is complete and audited, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until the project is approved, project work is complete, and the disbursement of approved funds is complete and audited, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
